title.zh-TW: Memory Node v1 手動編輯的新增欄位
title.en: Additional Fields for Manual Editing in Memory Node v1

body.zh-TW: 為了支持手動創建和編輯，`content.format` 和 `provenance.updated_at` 欄位被附加到 `node.v1.json`。
body.en: To support manual creation and editing, `content.format` and `provenance.updated_at` fields are appended to `node.v1.json`.
